Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 2024

Your files stay on your device

Compressly processes all files entirely within your browser using standard Web APIs (Canvas API, PDF.js). No files are ever uploaded to our servers.

Data we collect

We do not collect any personal information. We may use anonymous analytics (page views) to improve the tool. No cookies for tracking.

Advertising

We use Google AdSense to display ads. Google may use cookies for personalized advertising. You can opt out via Google's ad settings.

Contact

Questions? Email us at privacy@compressly.app
